# REQ-CR-260001: MVP Scope Exclusions for Graph Experience

- Class: CR
- Status: Accepted
- Date: 2026-04-13
- Source decision: A5 (Out-of-scope list)

## Requirement

MVP delivery shall exclude advanced bond-based categorization, multiple graph presentation modes, persisted graph-position metadata per atom, and full multi-user authentication/authorization.

## Rationale

Explicit exclusions are required to protect delivery focus, schedule, and verification quality for MVP.

## Scope Notes

- In scope for this constraint: release scoping and acceptance gating.
- Out of scope for this constraint: design exploration for post-MVP capabilities.

## Verification

- Release gating confirms excluded capabilities are not committed as MVP acceptance criteria.
- Backlog review confirms excluded capabilities remain in post-MVP planning.
- Regression review confirms no accidental coupling to excluded behaviors.

## Traceability

- Related ADRs: ADR-260002
- Related backlog items: BI-260002
